metadata_json.revision_goal: The deliverables meet the artifact contract and contain a clear decision note and reconstructed logic, but two substantive issues reduce semantic confidence: (1) the sensitivity sweep implemented and documented is +/-5% while the rubric requires +/-15%; (2) the workbook could not be programmatically opened/verified in this environment (openpyxl unavailable), so in-spreadsheet formulas, row-level indicators, and sensitivity logic are not independently verifiable. Addressing these will restore full rubric compliance and verifier confidence.
